Guillaume Poirier

gpoirier16@gmail.com917-650-3647New York, US

Summary

Experienced Principal Software Engineer with over 20 years of experience in software engineering, including roughly a decade specializing in Scala. Passionate about functional programming and improving team productivity by automating development workflows, accelerating the delivery of high-performance, reliable software. Quick to adapt to new technologies, serving as a reference point for colleagues and mentoring junior engineers.

Skills

  • Backend Development: Scala, Java, Functional Programming, Microservices
  • Infrastructure & DevOps: Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Helm, Google Cloud Platform, AWS, Azure
  • Data Processing: Apache Kafka, Apache Spark, Streaming, Data Pipelines
  • Build Tools & Frameworks: sbt, Bazel, Gradle, Maven
  • Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Cassandra, YugabyteDB, Redis
  • Scala Libraries: Cats, fs2, http4s, Slick, Circe, Shapeless, Finagle, Play Framework
  • Java Libraries: Spring Framework, Guava, Apache Commons, Log4j
  • Monitoring & Observability: Prometheus / Grafana, Google Cloud Monitoring, Zipkin
  • CI/CD: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, Bamboo

Work Experience

CipherTrace (acquired by Mastercard), New York, NY
Principal Software Engineer
Jan 2022 — Apr 2026
  • Part of the Data Platform team, primarily working on the Risk pipeline, a data pipeline consisting of different nodes reading from Kafka topics to transform the data and output the result to other Kafka topics.
  • Led the delivery of a new version of the pipeline using streaming to get real time updates to have risk values of new blockchain addresses to replace the batch pipeline that was providing updates every 10-20 hours.
  • Technologies: scala, kafka, yugabyte/cassandra, cats, fs2, google‐kubernetes‐engine, sbt, bazel
Tapad, New York, NY
Senior Software Engineer
Apr 2019 — Jan 2022
  • Part of the infrastructure team, responsible for shared libraries, framework and software infrastructure, such as an in-house tool to automate deployment across multiple production environments where the same code runs for different clients.
  • Led migration from Prometheus to Google Cloud Monitoring, improving observability across services and reducing alert noise, which accelerated incident response.
  • Technologies: scala, sbt, http4s, scala‐cats, kubernetes, google‐kubernetes‐engine, github‐actions, postgresql
Kabbage, New York, NY
Senior Software Engineer
May 2018 — Apr 2019
  • Joined Kabbage after their acquisition of Orchard.
  • Migrated the Orchard platform to integrate with Kabbage's single sign-on solution using Okta.
  • Worked on Kabbage's payment system, a micro-service architecture where the New York team developed Scala components using http4s and Slick, deployed on Kubernetes in AWS using Terraform.
  • Technologies: scala, sbt, finagle, http4s, scala‐cats, slick, postgresql, shapeless, circe, kubernetes, terraform
Orchard Platform, New York, NY
Senior Software Engineer
Aug 2016 — May 2018
  • Main engineer on the infrastructure team, responsible for providing and maintaining frameworks, libraries, and tools to other engineers.
  • Developed sbt plugins to improve the build and manage internal dependencies.
  • Built a framework integrating Zipkin to surface microservice internals, significantly improving troubleshooting and latency analysis.
  • Migrated microservice deployments from Mesos to Kubernetes, simplifying operations and enabling container‑native orchestration.
  • Technologies: scala, sbt, finagle, finch, shapeless, circe, redis, thrift, mesos, marathon, kubernetes
Meta, Toronto, ON, Canada
Lead Scala Developer
Jul 2015 — Apr 2016
  • Part of the Application Services team, working on backend components.
  • Transformed data from the data science team (papers, authors, concepts, journals) into efficient structures for consumption by the AngularJS application, which also manages user data like feeds and libraries.
  • As Lead Scala developer, directed the backend components and supported other developers in establishing a good development structure.
  • Technologies: scala, playframework, spray, akka‐stream, apache‐kafka, apache‐spark, mysql, orientdb

Senior Scala Developer

  • Technologies: scala, apache‐spark, spray, scala.js, scalaz
